Name: Bloom
Description: Controls the bloom post-processing effect that causes bright light sources and high-intensity pixels to glow and bleed into surrounding areas. Simulates optical light scattering in camera lenses and enhances perceived brightness and atmosphere.

Fields.Name: Is Bloom Enabled
Fields.Description: Enables or disables the bloom effect. When disabled, bright pixels will not produce glow or light bleeding.

Fields.Name: Bloom Alpha
Fields.Description: Controls the overall opacity and blending intensity of the bloom effect over the final image.

Fields.ID: ブルームカラースケール
Fields.Name: Bloom Color Scale
Fields.Description: Color multiplier applied to bloom contribution. Used to tint or amplify bloom coloration across the scene.

Fields.Name: Bloom Color Coefficient
Fields.Description: Controls the intensity scaling of bloom coloration. Higher values increase the strength of color contribution within the bloom effect.

Fields.Name: Bloom Saturation Control
Fields.Description: Adjusts the saturation level of bloom highlights. Higher values produce more vivid and colorful glow effects, while lower values create softer white bloom.

Fields.Name: Bloom Coupling Coefficient: 0
Fields.Description: Controls blending weight for the first bloom accumulation layer or blur stage.

Fields.Name: Bloom Coupling Coefficient: 1
Fields.Description: Controls blending weight for the second bloom accumulation layer or blur stage.

Fields.Name: Bloom Coupling Coefficient: 2
Fields.Description: Controls blending weight for the third bloom accumulation layer or blur stage.
